notes: STRENGTH visitors. SCAFFOLD — three visitors with the canonical waiter sequence; per-visitor step flavor is placeholder.

visitors.name: The Strongman
visitors.lore_text: You see The Strongman. (STRENGTH beat — refine.)
pre_arrival_hints: You sense the strongman is near.
Steps. Or breath. Or the room shifting.

steps.greet: You meet eyes with The Strongman. The room registers it.
steps.listen: The Strongman tells you what they came to tell you.
steps.deliver: You give The Strongman what they were after.
steps.sit_with: The Strongman stays for a beat. You stay back.
